name: aws-pilot
description: Lets Claude Code drive your AWS account end-to-end. Atomic skills per service (EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, Route53, RDS, CloudWatch, Cost), model-aware sub-agents, and a boto3 MCP server (stdio for local dev, HTTP for VPS). Safety-first: read-only by default, destructive ops gated by hooks, full audit log.

aws_profile.title: AWS CLI profile
aws_profile.description: AWS CLI profile to use. Run 'aws configure --profile <name>' first.

default_region.title: Default AWS region
default_region.description: Default AWS region for new resources (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1).

mode.title: Operation mode
mode.description: Operation mode: 'read-only' (no writes), 'dry-run' (plan only), or 'execute' (apply changes).

monthly_budget_usd.title: Monthly budget (USD)
monthly_budget_usd.description: Monthly budget cap in USD. The pilot will warn when approaching this and refuse provisioning that would exceed it.

free_tier_only.title: Free Tier only (no paid services)
free_tier_only.description: If true, hooks block any AWS command that would leave the Free Tier — non-Free instance types, RDS, NAT Gateway, ALB, Elasticache, EKS, etc. Set to false ONLY if you explicitly accept paid services.

require_confirm_destructive.title: Confirm destructive ops
require_confirm_destructive.description: If true, terminate/delete/drop ops require explicit yes from user via hook.

audit_log.title: Audit log path
audit_log.description: Path to JSONL audit log of every AWS API call.

mcp_remote_url.title: Remote MCP URL
mcp_remote_url.description: URL of the AWS-pilot MCP server hosted on a VPS (leave blank to run locally via stdio).

mcp_auth_token.title: Remote MCP auth token
mcp_auth_token.description: Bearer token for the remote MCP (only used if mcp_remote_url is set).
